'''mangunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oildown|oildown]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ng-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oildown|oildown]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| mangunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mænginith|mænginith]] || [[word:mænginij|mænginij]] || [[word:mænginish|mænginish]] || [[word:mængini|mængini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mangungunuth|mangungunuth]] || [[word:mangungunuj|mangungunuj]] || [[word:mangungunush|mangungunush]] || [[word:mangungunu|mangungunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mangunuth|mangunuth]] || [[word:mangunuj|mangunuj]] || [[word:mangunush|mangunush]] || [[word:mangunu|mangunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mangufnuth|mangufnuth]] || [[word:mangufnuj|mangufnuj]] || [[word:mangufnush|mangufnush]] || [[word:mangufnuf|mangufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mangunuthu|mangunuthu]] || [[word:mangunuju|mangunuju]] || [[word:mangunushu|mangunushu]] || [[word:mangunuku|mangunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mangunuth|mangunuth]] || [[word:mangunuj|mangunuj]] || [[word:mangunush|mangunush]] || [[word:mangunu|mangunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mangunuthul|mangunuthul]] || [[word:mangunujul|mangunujul]] || [[word:mangunushul|mangunushul]] || [[word:mangunukul|mangunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mangunuthuthu|mangunuthuthu]] || [[word:mangunujuju|mangunujuju]] || [[word:mangunushushu|mangunushushu]] || [[word:mangunuku|mangunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mangunuthun|mangunuthun]] || [[word:mangunujun|mangunujun]] || [[word:mangunushun|mangunushun]] || [[word:mangunukun|mangunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mangunuthuoro|mangunuthuoro]] || [[word:mangunujuoro|mangunujuoro]] || [[word:mangunushuoro|mangunushuoro]] || [[word:mangunukuoro|mangunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
